# mrclean test fixture — synthetic invalid value for detection pattern testing
# Source: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic) format — ghp_ prefix + 36 alphanumeric chars
# Checksum-flip: token body contains no valid Luhn check sum — this is structurally shaped but invalid
# License: test fixture only — not a real credential

Set the GITHUB_TOKEN to ghp_1234567890abcdefGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ for CI authentication.
